calendar.matters:
MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Sep-21-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Eric A. Handler, Esq. of DONAHUE GALLAGHER WOODS 510/451-0544, specially appearing for defendants/mvoing parties First State Management Group, Inc. and Hartford Fire Insurance Co.
Ivan M. Gold, Esq. of ALLEN MATKINS 273-7431, appearing for plaintiff/opposing party Wells Fargo

RULING:
A R G U E D; the Court took DEFENDANTS FIRST STATE MANAGEMENT GROUP, INC. and HARTFORD FIRE INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS under submission. Both side submitted proposed order for the Court's consideration. (301/JLW/AC) Judge James L. Warren, Reporter Christina Paxton CSR #1558.

MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Sep-15-2005 Continued To Sep-20-05 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Eric Handler, Esq. of Donahue, Gallagher & Woods, 510-451-0544 for defendant and moving party FIRST STATE MANAGEMENT GROUP, INC., HARTFORD FIRE INSURANCE COMPANY
Ivan Gold, Esq. of Allen & Matkins, 415-273-7431 for plaintiff and opposing party Wells Fargo Bank.

RULING:
MATTER WAS NOT A R G U E D. The Court MODIFIED its Tentative Ruling AND CONTINUED TO 9/20/05
DEFENDANT FIRST STATE MANAGEMENT GROUP, INC., HARTFORD FIRE INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS PER REQUEST OF THE MOVING PARTY. Judge James L. Warren, Reporter Christina Paxton CSR #1558. (301/JLW)
